description: Letter addressed to R. Ḥananel, who receives about 10 lines of titles. In Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Likely early 13th century. Only three lines are preserved of the body of the letter. The writer alludes to a woman (or to the ḥaḍra=addressee?) who was staying with him in S[...]. The rest is missing.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
